summary: Project Instance DFM windows now participate in shell DFM commands and macros.
details: When a floating DFM window is active inside Project Instance, DFM Edit and Help menu actions such as Undo/Redo Ratio Change and Open DFM JSON route to that nested DFM window.
Macros can now read and apply active DFM context from a Project Instance DFM window using the same message flow as standalone DFM tabs.
Project Instance now shows a dataset-toolbar reload alert when new cached instance names are detected on disk instead of reloading from the next page click.
